śiphā
1 A fibrous root.
2 The root of a water-lily.
3 A root in general.
4 A stroke with a whip.
5 A mother.
6 A river.
7 Turmeric.
8 Spikenard.
Comp.
— kaṃdaḥ -daṃ the root of a water-lily.
— dharaḥ a branch.
— ruhaḥ the (Indian) fig-tree.
